name: employment_mutual_aid_request_marrowbridge_lib_eq
premise: A Employment response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving employment mutual aid request marrowbridge lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. This decision will be treated as precedent unless you explicitly time-box it. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Ansel Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Ansel Nielsen, accountable for a defensible call in Employment when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Ansel Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Ansel Kowalski, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Employment.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Evidence is partial. Ansel Nielsen must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Ansel Nielsen do?
